final_files.notes: Final selected image. Uses cloth-wrapped handoff object and abstract linear cabinet scratches to avoid new badge or emblem design.

history_files.reason_retained: Earlier generated version retained for audit; rejected as final because the hidden cabinet mark was too circular and could be misread as a new old-relay emblem.

retry_notes: Initial version had a hidden circular cabinet mark, so it was archived and replaced.
Final version removes visible token face, circular badge shapes, and complete hidden emblems.
